seed.$description: Brand-level seed tokens — the minimal set that defines the entire design system. Change one value here and all derived tokens (map, semantic, component) shift accordingly.

colorTextBase.$description: Base text color (graphite) — alpha derivatives computed in map tier

colorBgBase.$description: Base background color (cream) — surfaces derived in map tier

fontSize.$description: Base font size in px — type scale derived via major third (1.25) ratio

sizeUnit.$description: Base spatial unit in px — all spacing = sizeUnit × (sizeStep + offset)

sizeStep.$description: Step multiplier — combined with sizeUnit produces 4/8/12/16/20/24/32/40/48 scale

controlHeight.$description: Default control height in px (md = h-10). SM=32, LG=48 derived in map tier.

borderRadius.$description: Base border radius in px (sm). Scale derived in map tier: XS=2, SM=4, MD=8, LG=12.

lineWidth.$description: Default border width in px — neo-brutalist thick border

motionBase.$description: Base motion duration in seconds — derivatives add motionUnit increments

motionUnit.$description: Duration increment in seconds — motionBase + N × motionUnit
